title: dryopteris rupestris
intro: Dryopteris rupestris, also known as the rocky wood fern, is a species of fern that is native to Europe, North Africa, and Western Asia. It is a medicinal plant that has been used for centuries to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Dryopteris rupestris include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory function, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of ailments, including colds and flu.
